characters_attr_sum_check.name: characters_attr_sum_check
characters_attr_sum_check.value:
"characters"."attr_physical" + "characters"."attr_mental" + "characters"."attr_magical" = 10
          AND "characters"."attr_physical" BETWEEN -1 AND 5
          AND "characters"."attr_mental" BETWEEN -1 AND 5
          AND "characters"."attr_magical" BETWEEN -1 AND 5
